Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Analytic Fog Rendering with Volumetric Primitives (2025) 71 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. Entomologists use a particle accelerator to image ants at scale 57 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. Supertoast tables 39 upvotes, 4 comments
  4. Triplet Superconductor 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. Payphone Go 241 upvotes, 53 comments
  6. Xous security focused open source on 22nm custom silicon 64 upvotes, 10 comments
  7. CT Scans of Health Wearables 142 upvotes, 29 comments
  8. Paul Brainerd, founder of Aldus PageMaker, has died 94 upvotes, 18 comments
  9. Ada 2022 11 upvotes, 0 comments
  10. Hardening Firefox with Anthropic's Red Team 333 upvotes, 105 comments
  11. LibreSprite – open-source pixel art editor 209 upvotes, 73 comments
  12. Astra: An open-source observatory control software 57 upvotes, 15 comments
  13. Apache Otava 12 upvotes, 1 comments
  14. Good Bad ISPs 74 upvotes, 25 comments
  15. Open Camera is a FOSS Camera App for Android 159 upvotes, 69 comments
  16. New imagery suggests U.S. responsible for Iran school strike 85 upvotes, 37 comments
  17. Workers who love ‘synergizing paradigms’ might be bad at their jobs 430 upvotes, 243 comments
  18. 70k Books Found in Hidden Library in This Germany Home (2023) 40 upvotes, 15 comments
  19. Show HN: Moongate – Ultima Online server emulator in .NET 10 with Lua scripting 182 upvotes, 103 comments
  20. A tool that removes censorship from open-weight LLMs 38 upvotes, 16 comments
  21. It took four years until 2011’s iOS 5 gave everyone an emoji keyboard 112 upvotes, 64 comments
  22. Tech employment now significantly worse than the 2008 or 2020 recessions 359 upvotes, 243 comments
  23. System76 on Age Verification Laws 764 upvotes, 548 comments
  24. Show HN: A trainable, modular electronic nose for industrial use 20 upvotes, 7 comments
  25. The Brand Age 455 upvotes, 352 comments
  26. Show HN: Claude-replay – A video-like player for Claude Code sessions 30 upvotes, 16 comments
  27. Global warming has accelerated significantly 796 upvotes, 778 comments
  28. We might all be AI engineers now 116 upvotes, 169 comments
  29. Launch HN: Palus Finance (YC W26): Better yields on idle cash for startups, SMBs 19 upvotes, 25 comments
  30. Multifactor (YC F25) Is Hiring an Engineering Lead 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 4:30am, 7 March 2026. Source here.
